description: Zoho MCP is a Zoho service for creating Model Context Protocol servers that expose tools from Zoho and third-party business applications to AI clients. Users configure servers and tools in the Zoho MCP console, then connect those servers to clients such as Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or VS Code.
summary: zohomcp.jp exposes a Zoho MCP server surface for connecting AI/MCP clients; authentication is via Zoho MCP OAuth on a per-server generated MCP URL.
